## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `make check`.
- [ ] I added or updated tests and documentation for changed behavior.
- [ ] I did not weaken a test, benchmark, accessibility, privacy, or security gate.
- [ ] I included no credentials, personal data, production records, or private material.
- [ ] Provider claims cite primary sources and distinguish observed from unobserved behavior.
- [ ] Every commit is signed off (`git commit -s`) under DCO 1.1.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` when behavior changed.
